text.title: Trunk-Based Development Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for trunk-based-dev-patterns.

conclusion.verdict: feature flag with cleanup ticket; chunked PRs < 24h; ramp via dark launch
Branch by Abstraction five-step (see trunk-based-branch-by-abstraction); cleanup ticket at step 1
apply trunk-based-challenges to identify first failing gate

text.example: goal=large_refactor → BbA with flag billing.use_stripe_v2; cleanup ticket OPS-148; ramp 0% -> 0.5% (diurnal) -> 5% -> 25% -> 100%. Rule: one-flag-one-task-one-cleanup.
